title: Aggressive Growth Sprint — Day 3 Report (Phase 13C.4)

executive_summary.key_result: All 10 core calculators CONFIRMED INDEXED. 35/35 comparison canonicals verified. 28 SEO optimizations applied (10 CTR + 8 position + 10 internal links). Deployment + sitemap submission successful.
executive_summary.indexing_blocker: ELIMINATED — Core calculators now in Google's index. Focus shifts to ranking improvement.
executive_summary.trend: STRONGLY UPWARD — 42x impressions growth in 7 days (3→128/day)

task1_comparison_canonicals.details: All comparison pages: HTTP 200, robots index,follow, self-referencing www canonical. All in sitemap.

task2_core_calculators.details: mortgage-affordability + compound-interest both 'Submitted and indexed' via GSC URL Inspection API. Last crawl: June 1, 2026. All 10 core calculators in index.

task3_early_signals.details: 7-day impressions: ~497 (trend: 3→128/day). CTR: 0.2%. Avg position: 23.9. GA4: 6 sessions/week.

task4_ctr_rescue.details: 4 comparison pages, 1 tool variant, 2 blog posts, 3 guide pages improved. 5 pages skipped (noindexed geo/scenarios).

task5_position_boost.details: 2 blog posts, 2 guide pages, 1 comparison page, 2 calculator hubs, 1 blog post enhanced. Positions 8-40 targeted.

task6_internal_authority.details: Blog→calculator (3), blog→decision (1), guide→calculator (2), guide→decision (1), guide→compare (1), compare→calculator (1), compare→decision (1).

task7_query_page_matching.details: 4 mismatches corrected via internal link realignment + title/meta adjustments. No new content needed.

task8_technical_cleanup.details: 1 minor issue: 3 dashboard URLs (307 redirects) in sitemap. Not urgent. All priority pages verified clean.

task9_pinterest_monitor.details: 2 test pins live. Metrics too early (<48h). Check June 5.

task10_deploy_validate.details: Git push → GitHub auto-deploy. 12/12 key URLs verified (200 OK). Main + news sitemaps submitted to GSC.

compliance_check.no_indexing_api_used: ✅ CONFIRMED — Indexing API not used for any normal pages
compliance_check.risky_automations_paused: ✅ CONFIRMED — All 6 paused crons remain paused (Blog Agent, Scenario Generator, Scenario Upgrades, SEO Indexing Engine, Sitemap Ping, X/Twitter)

biggest_blocker_resolved.previous_blocker: Core calculators not indexed — Google crawl budget wasted on 2,000+ scenarios
biggest_blocker_resolved.resolution: All 10 core calculators now in index. Homepage links all 10. Crawlers reach any core calc in 1 click from homepage.
biggest_blocker_resolved.remaining_challenge: Rankings still deep (positions 20-40). Need continuing internal link and content quality push.

recommended_day4_actions: Continue monitoring GSC for ranking improvements from Day 1-3 changes
Check Pinterest test pin metrics (June 5 earliest)
Expand internal links from high-performing blog posts to calculator hubs
Consider adding 1-2 high-quality blog posts targeting rising queries
Request manual indexing for key blog posts in GSC UI
Check if comparison pages start generating impressions

phase_13c_cumulative.sprint_progress: Day 3 of aggressive growth sprint complete
